title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 1: Application of risk management
title.zh: 动物组织及其衍生物制造的医疗器械 - 第1部分：风险管理的应用

standards.scope: Animal tissue medical devices - Risk management.
standards.abstract: Risk management for medical devices utilizing animal tissues.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 2: Controls on sourcing, collection and handling
title.zh: 动物组织及其衍生物制造的医疗器械 - 第2部分：来源、采集和处理的控制

standards.abstract: Controls on sourcing, collection and handling of animal tissues.

title.en: Medical devices utilizing animal tissues and their derivatives - Part 3: Validation of the elimination and/or inactivation of viruses and transmissible spongiform encephalopathy (TSE) agents
title.zh: 动物组织及其衍生物制造的医疗器械 - 第3部分：病毒和传播性海绵状脑病(TSE)因子的消除和/或灭活的确认

standards.abstract: Validation of virus and TSE agent inactivation for animal tissue devices.

title.en: Plastics collapsible containers for human blood and blood components - Part 1: Conventional containers
title.zh: 人体血液和血液成分用塑料可折叠容器 - 第1部分：常规容器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements including performance requirements for plastics collapsible containers, complete with satellite containers and accessory equipment, for collection, storage and transport of blood and blood components. Edition 4.
standards.scope: Plastic blood bags for collection, storage and transport of blood and blood components.

title.en: Plastics collapsible containers for human blood and blood components - Part 4: Apheresis blood bag systems with integrated features
title.zh: 人体血液和血液成分用塑料可折叠容器 - 第4部分：带集成功能的单采血袋系统

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for apheresis blood bag systems with integrated features for separation, collection and storage of blood components. Confirmed 2021.
standards.scope: Apheresis blood bag systems with integrated separation features.

title.en: General requirements of tissue-engineered medical products
title.zh: 组织工程医疗产品的通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for tissue-engineered medical products (TEMPs) used in regenerative medicine, including safety, materials, manufacture and quality control. Confirmed 2024.
standards.scope: General requirements for tissue-engineered medical products used in regenerative medicine.
